name: Booking Reminders
author: CyberCheck
desc: Texts every guest the day before their booking — fewer no-shows, zero effort. Runs automatically on the platform clock.

automation.template: [{business}] Reminder: {title} tomorrow{time}. Need to change it? {manage}

setup.label: Reminder message
setup.def: [{business}] Reminder: {title} tomorrow{time}. Need to change it? {manage}
